label: Bill repeat mode
description: Defines a bill repeat mode that controls how many times a production bill repeats (e.g. a fixed count, until a target stock is reached, or forever).

listOrder.label: List order
listOrder.description: Controls the position of this repeat mode in the bill configuration menu. Shipped modes use multiples of 10 (0, 10, 20) to leave room for modded entries.

new-bill-repeat-mode.label: New bill repeat mode
new-bill-repeat-mode.description: Minimal bill repeat mode with a def name, label, and list order.
